revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:1 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:1月27日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 1월 27일]][[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:正月廿七]][[zh:正月廿七]]
{{Not to be confused with|January 27|qq=January 27}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=一月廿七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 1월 27일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar January|qq=}} '''January 27''' is the 27th day of the month {{ill|Zhengyue|en|Zhengyue|qid=Q1072983|lt=January (Mutsuki)|1=Zhengyue}}, the 1st month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842|1=senpu}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Jōkyū|en|Jōkyū|qid=Q1195428|lt=Jōkyū|1=Jōkyū}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1219|en|1219|qid=Q5388|lt=1219|1=1219}} {{ill|February 13|en|February 13|qid=Q2333|lt=February 13|1=February 13}}) – In Kamakura at [[Tsurugaoka Hachimangū|鶴岡八幡宮]], Minamoto no Sanetomo was assassinated by his nephew, {{ill|Kugyō (priest)|en|Kugyō (priest)|qid=Q6442006|lt=Kōkyō|1=Kugyō (priest)}}, leading to the disruption of the Minamoto line. <ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-03|qq=}}</ref> * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji|1=Meiji era}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1870|en|1870|qid=Q7741|lt=1870|1=1870}} {{ill|February 27|en|February 27|qid=Q2361|lt=February 27|1=February 27}}) – The Daijō-kan (Grand Council of State) issued the “Steamship Regulations” and the “Merchant Ship Regulations,” and the specifications for the national flag ({{ill|Nisshōki|ja|日章旗|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nisshōki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日本の国旗|1=Flag of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q43175}}) were set; the flag's specifications were later commemorated as the National Flag Establishment Memorial Day.
== Births == * [[:en:天徳|天徳]] 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|959|en|959|qid=Q23750|lt=959|1=959}} {{ill|April 12|en|April 12|qid=Q2499|lt=April 12|1=April 12}}) – {{ill|Emperor En'yū|en|Emperor En'yū|qid=Q374104|lt=Enyū Tennō|1=Emperor En'yū}}, the 64th Emperor of Japan (died {{ill|991|en|991|qid=Q24097|lt=991|1=991}}). * {{ill|Ryakuō|en|Ryakuō|qid=Q1146182|lt=Ryakuō|1=Ryakuō}} 1st year/{{ill|Engen|en|Engen|qid=Q1194159|lt=Engen|1=Engen}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1338|en|1338|qid=Q6044|lt=1338|1=1338}} {{ill|March 23|en|March 23|qid=Q2445|lt=March 23|1=March 23}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Kōgon|en|Emperor Go-Kōgon|qid=Q555465|lt=Go-Kōgen Tennō|1=Emperor Go-Kōgon}}, the 4th Emperor of the Northern Court (died {{ill|1374|en|1374|qid=Q6269|lt=1374|1=1374}}). * {{ill|Kannin|en|Kannin|qid=Q1193951|lt=Kansei|1=Kannin}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1791|en|1791|qid=Q7784|lt=1791|1=1791}} {{ill|April 4|en|April 4|qid=Q2508|lt=April 4|1=April 4}}) – {{ill|Anseki Gensan|ja|安積艮斎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Anseki Gensan|1=Asaka Gonsai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q4071127}}, a Confucian scholar (died {{ill|1861|en|1861|qid=Q7693|lt=1861|1=1861}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Jōkyū|en|Jōkyū|qid=Q1195428|lt=Jōkyū|1=Jōkyū}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1219|en|1219|qid=Q5388|lt=1219|1=1219}} {{ill|February 13|en|February 13|qid=Q2333|lt=February 13|1=February 13}}) – {{ill|Minamoto no Sanetomo|en|Minamoto no Sanetomo|qid=Q174249|lt=Minamoto no Sanetomo|1=Minamoto no Sanetomo}}, the 3rd Shōgun of the Kamakura shogunate (born {{ill|1192|en|1192|qid=Q19739|lt=1192|1=1192}}). * In the same Jōkyū 1st year, on February 13, {{ill|Kugyō (priest)|en|Kugyō (priest)|qid=Q6442006|lt=Kōkyō|1=Kugyō (priest)}}, a son of Minamoto no Yoriie, died (born {{ill|1200|en|1200|qid=Q5224|lt=1200|1=1200}}).
== Commemorations == * 晦日正月
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|1|26|1|28|12|27|2|1|0127|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:一月廿七]]
{{translated page|ja|1月27日 (旧暦)|version=83320854|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[cdo:1 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[de:January 27 (Lunisolar)]]
[[ko:음력 1월 27일]] [[ja:1月27日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:正月廿七]]
[[ar:January 27 (Lunisolar)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:正月廿七]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:正月廿七]] {{wikidata link|Q839032}} [[Category:Days 27 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar January]] [[Category:Senbu]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
